home.testimonials.title: What Our Partners Say
home.testimonials.subtitle: Vending operators and distributors across 60+ countries share their Qtech experience.
home.testimonials.q1: Our rose vending kiosks became the most photographed spot in the mall — sales doubled in the first quarter.
home.testimonials.q2: The 24/7 pizza machines run flawlessly through the summer season — remote alerts save us weekly site visits.
home.testimonials.q3: Qtech's OEM flexibility let us launch a private-label line in 8 weeks. Support replies within a day, every time.
home.testimonials.q4: Our coffee kiosks pour barista-quality drinks with zero staff — we placed three at the transit hub and they paid back in under six months.
home.testimonials.q5: The chilled juice machines hold drinks at the perfect temperature all summer. Qtech's remote dashboard lets me run 40 sites from my phone.
home.testimonials.q6: We white-labelled the cotton-candy machines for our amusement parks. The branding kit and UI localisation were turnkey — guests love the live demo.
